---
name: Tip Submission
about: Share a cost-saving strategy for Claude Code
title: "[TIP] "
labels: tip, community
assignees: ''
---

## Strategy Name

<!-- A short, descriptive name for this tip (e.g., "Use .claudeignore for lock files") -->

## Expected Savings

<!-- Estimated percentage or dollar reduction (e.g., "10-20% reduction in input tokens") -->

## Effort Level

<!-- How hard is this to implement? Choose one: -->
- [ ] Minimal (< 5 minutes, config change only)
- [ ] Low (5-15 minutes, minor workflow change)
- [ ] Medium (15-60 minutes, requires setup or refactoring)
- [ ] High (1+ hours, significant workflow redesign)

## Detailed Explanation

<!-- Describe the strategy clearly. Include:
- What problem does this solve?
- Step-by-step instructions to implement it
- Any config files, commands, or code snippets needed
-->

## Evidence / Benchmarks

<!-- How do you know this works? Include any of the following:
- Before/after token counts
- Cost comparison data
- Session screenshots or logs
- Link to relevant documentation
- "Anecdotal" is fine too — just note it
-->

## Which Models / Plans Does This Apply To?

<!-- Check all that apply: -->
- [ ] All models
- [ ] Opus
- [ ] Sonnet
- [ ] Haiku
- [ ] Pro plan
- [ ] Max plan
- [ ] API usage

## Additional Context

<!-- Anything else? Caveats, tradeoffs, related tips, etc. -->
